title: Supreme Court orders eviction of encroachers from Agasthyamalai hills
description: The Supreme Court has directed the Tamil Nadu government to prepare and implement a time-bound plan for the removal of encroachments from the Agasthyamalai ecological landscape, a biodiversity-rich region comprising protected forests, wildlife sanctuaries and tiger reserves spread across Tamil Nadu and Kerala [A John Kennedy v. State of Tamil Nadu].In a judgment delivered on May 29, a Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta also ordered disciplinary and legal action against 118 serving a
